name: Cranberry Applesauce Bread
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CRANAPPLESAUCE-------------------------------
1 1/4 cup Cranberries
1/2 teaspoon Grated zest of lemon
4 medium Golden delicious apples
1/2 cup Sugar +
1 teaspoon Ginger root
2 tablespoons Water
1/4 teaspoon Cinnamon
Put all in machine sweet bread cycle if you have it.
CRANAPPLESAUCE peeled and diced (1/2 inch) put water and sugar in a large heavy saucepan and place over high heat. Cook stirring until sugar is dissolved. Add apples, cover, stir frequently, cook 5 minutes then add cranberries. Cook 15 to 20 minutes till cranberries pop and apples are soft, then mash with potato masher. Will still be slightly lumpy. Add spices and zest. Cook another 5 minutes for flavor to blend. Cool before putting in the bread. Sauce will keep in fridge for 3 days. Also can be served warm with dinner.
NOTE: This is a wet dough
FROM: Diana Lewis (VGWN37A)
